problem id: 405262aa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHR(4)

examples:
  00110011 -> 00000010
  00011011 -> 00000000
  00101011 -> 00000010
  11111010 -> 00000101
  10111111 -> 00001011
  00001010 -> 00000000
  10101011 -> 00000010
  01111110 -> 00000100

query: 01100110
predicted answer: 00000100
